title: Responsive Web Design (freeCodeCamp)
description: A fully free, self-paced certification covering HTML, CSS and responsive design fundamentals, with hands-on projects. 100% free forever, including the certificate.

title: CS50x: Introduction to Computer Science (Harvard, via edX)
description: Harvard's legendary intro to computer science and programming — covers C, Python, SQL, and web development. Free to audit, and a free certificate is available if you complete the course requirements.

title: Fundamentals of Digital Marketing (Google Digital Garage)
description: Google's own free course on digital marketing basics — SEO, social media, analytics and more. Completely free, with a free certificate directly from Google, no subscription needed.

title: NPTEL Online Courses (IIT/IISc faculty)
description: Free engineering courses taught by IIT and IISc professors, across every major branch. Learning and course content are free; the certificate requires a paid proctored exam (heavily subsidized, around ₹1000) — many GTU students already use NPTEL certificates for activity points.

title: IBM SkillsBuild
description: Free courses for students covering AI, cybersecurity, data science and more, built by IBM. Courses and certificates are both completely free.
